name: Black-Box Iter 3 — adversarial coverage
description: Iter-3 suite. Adversarial cases across all branches. Tests edge cases, ambiguity, mixed-intent, hidden DDL in prose, near-miss RAG, multi-table joins, long verbose questions. Authored independently of iter-1/2 results so we have a clean blind-test on the final fixed code.

Scenarios.Question: hi, how many tickets are open?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: hello! can you list the tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: how many tickets do we have in total
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: show me critical tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE p.Name = 'Critical' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: list users with at least one ticket
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DISTINCT u.UserName FROM AspNetUsers u JOIN Tickets t ON t.CreatedByUserId = u.Id WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: users without any tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName FROM AspNetUsers u WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Tickets t WHERE t.CreatedByUserId = u.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0)

Scenarios.Question: top 5 by tickets created
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 u.UserName, COUNT(t.Id) AS TicketCount FROM AspNetUsers u LEFT JOIN Tickets t ON t.CreatedByUserId = u.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY u.UserName ORDER BY TicketCount DESC

Scenarios.Question: ticket count grouped by status
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT s.Name, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY s.Name ORDER BY Count DESC

Scenarios.Question: how many weather tickets do we have
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: currency tickets opened this month
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: can you make the tickets table go away please
remove all the old closed tickets from the database
set the status of ticket TCK-001 = closed
create the new admin user account
